name: Research & Summarize Topic
description: Search for a topic on Google, open the top 3 results in separate tabs, read each article, then write a comprehensive 500-word summary combining all sources and save it as a downloaded text file.
goalPrompt: Search for [TOPIC] on Google, open the top 3 results in separate tabs, read each article, then write a comprehensive 500-word summary combining all sources and save it by evaluating a JS snippet that triggers a download of the text.
